subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, I beseech Thee to leave me not to myself; rather shield me, through the sovereignty of Names, from self and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بان لاتدعنی بنفسی فاحفظنی بسلطان الاسماء عن النفس و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will
